api_key.description: Captain Data API key. Sent as the X-API-Key header; never logged.

project_uid.description: Captain Data project id. Sent as the X-Project-Id header on every request; required, matching legacy.

base_url.description: Captain Data API base URL override for tests or proxies.

workflow_uid.description: Parent workflow uid; required to read the jobs stream (scopes GET /workflows/{workflow_uid}/jobs).

job_uid.description: Parent job uid; required to read the job_results stream (scopes GET /jobs/{job_uid}/results).

mode.description: Runtime mode: live (default) or fixture for credential-free conformance.
